description_long: This is a modern rectangular vessel sink mounted atop a wooden vanity cabinet. The sink basin is white and angular, with straight edges and a flat bottom, and features a single metallic faucet positioned at the rear center. The vanity cabinet is constructed from wood with a natural brown finish, displaying horizontal wood grain patterns and a single door on one side. The rear view reveals exposed plumbing and internal structural supports, indicating practical installation details. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban bathrooms or public washrooms. The combination of wood and ceramic materials gives it a warm yet functional appearance.
description: A modern rectangular white vessel sink with a metallic faucet, mounted on a brown wooden vanity cabinet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the wooden cabinet and the profile of the white vessel sink with the faucet visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wooden cabinet, the rectangular white sink, and the centrally placed faucet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the cabinet's side panel and the sink's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the internal plumbing, structural supports, and the back of the sink and cabinet.
